# Security Policy

BlackPanda Labs public projects are intended for authorized security testing, controlled laboratory research, secure development education and defensive validation.

Please do not publicly disclose sensitive details, credentials, private keys, admin routes or reproducible attack paths affecting live systems. Report suspected issues privately through the official contact method.

## Reporting

Use the official public contact method listed on the BlackPanda Labs website. Do not post secrets or exploit details in public issues.

## Scope

In scope:

- Public repository documentation issues.
- Public project security concerns.
- Accidental exposure of sensitive public content.

Out of scope:

- Testing third-party systems without permission.
- Social engineering.
- Credential stuffing.
- Denial-of-service testing.
- Requests for private production access.
